trade.summary: Bilateral trade is growing, driven by the EU-Corea del Sud Free Trade Agreement. Francia exports luxury goods, aircraft, and agri-food to Corea del Sud. Corea del Sud exports electronics, automobiles, ships, and semiconductors to Francia. Corea del Sudn cultural exports have surged through Corea del Sudn Wave popularity in Francia.

diplomatic.summary: Francia and Corea del Sud elevated their bilateral relationship in 2023. Shared concerns over North Corea del Sud and Russia's aggression bring the two closer. Corea del Sud participates in G7 summits as a guest. Francia supports Corea del Sudn peninsula diplomacy. Cultural ties through the Corea del Sudn Wave have strengthened people-to-people bonds.

military.summary: Growing defence cooperation as Corea del Sud emerges as a major arms exporter. Francia and Corea del Sud discussed potential cooperation in submarine and naval technologies. Corea del Sud exports artillery and ammunition to European partners. Limited direct French-Corea del Sudn military exercises but cooperative in NATO-adjacent events.

financial.summary: Corea del Sudn conglomerates (Samsung, LG, Hyundai) have significant investments in Francia including EV battery factories. French companies invest in Corea del Sud in luxury retail and energy. Corea del Sudn FDI into Francia has surged with EV supply chain investments linked to EU industrial policy.

energy.summary: Cooperation in nuclear energy technology (Francia's EDF and Corea del Sud's KHNP compete globally but cooperate on standards). Francia exports some LNG indirectly. Cooperation in hydrogen technology and offshore wind growing.

scientific.summary: Active scientific exchange in AI, materials science, and nuclear fusion. Corea del Sudn students represent one of the largest Asian student populations in Francia. Joint CNRS-Corea del Sudn research institute agreements in place. Corea del Sudn Wave has increased French interest in Corea del Sudn culture and language.
